mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, task_name, account_group_id, account_group_name, marketing_template_id, marketing_template_name, status, selected_account_count, target_group_count, target_pair_count, sent_message_count, failed_message_count, send_per_round, send_interval_seconds, is_online_check_enabled, is_abnormal_group_skipped, is_auto_retry_enabled, retry_limit, remark, started_at, last_sent_at, finished_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at

id, tenant_id, marketing_task_id, account_id, account_phone, group_link_id, group_jid, group_link_url, group_name, status, sent_message_count, failed_message_count, retry_count, last_attempt_at, last_sent_at, last_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO marketing_task (task_name, account_group_id, account_group_name, marketing_template_id, marketing_template_name, status, selected_account_count, target_group_count, target_pair_count, sent_message_count, failed_message_count, send_per_round, send_interval_seconds, is_online_check_enabled, is_abnormal_group_skipped, is_auto_retry_enabled, retry_limit, remark, started_at, last_sent_at, finished_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{accountGroupId}, #{accountGroupName}, #{marketingTemplateId}, #{marketingTemplateName}, #{status}, #{selectedAccountCount}, #{targetGroupCount}, #{targetPairCount}, #{sentMessageCount}, #{failedMessageCount}, #{sendPerRound}, #{sendIntervalSeconds}, #{onlineCheckEnabled}, #{abnormalGroupSkipped}, #{autoRetryEnabled}, #{retryLimit}, #{remark}, #{startedAt}, #{lastSentAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO marketing_task_target (marketing_task_id, account_id, account_phone, group_link_id, group_jid, group_link_url, group_name, status, sent_message_count, failed_message_count, retry_count, last_attempt_at, last_sent_at, last_reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{t.marketingTaskId}, #{t.accountId}, #{t.accountPhone}, #{t.groupLinkId}, #{t.groupJid}, #{t.groupLinkUrl}, #{t.groupName}, #{t.status}, #{t.sentMessageCount}, #{t.failedMessageCount}, #{t.retryCount}, #{t.lastAttemptAt}, #{t.lastSentAt}, #{t.lastReason}, #{t.createdAt}, #{t.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM marketing_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM marketing_task_target WHERE marketing_task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE marketing_task SET status = 2, started_at = COALESCE(started_at, #{now}), updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN (1, 5)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketing_task WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 2 AND id IN #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE marketing_task SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status <> 2 AND id IN #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM marketing_task
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{q.pageSize} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT a.id AS accountId, a.ws_phone AS accountPhone, g.id AS groupLinkId, p.group_jid AS groupJid, g.link_url AS groupLinkUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(g.group_name), ''), p.wa_subject) AS groupName FROM account a JOIN group_link g ON g.id = #{groupLinkId} AND g.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN group_link_preview p ON p.group_link_id = g.id WHERE a.id = #{accountId} AND a.account_group_id = #{accountGroupId} AND a.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
